emails.subject: RE: ? re: Bankers Trust/ Deutsche Bank
emails.body: RE: re: Bankers Trust/ Deutsche Bank We are waiting for Mark Greenberg to finalize the negotiations on the amendment to the online ETA for DB. We would like to shut down BT from all financial trading. However, what we found was that DB will not execute the online ETA without some revisions. Mark is negotiating an amendment to the ETA with DB. Meanwhile, BT had already been trading online. Since that cat was already out of the bag so to speak, DB didn't want to shut them down from trading without having another avenue to trade, so we are continuing to trade as BT. We do not want to do this FOREVER, HOWEVER, so we do need to get BT SHUT DOWN. HOW GOES IT MARK???? To: Panus, Stephanie; Bailey, Susan; Jones, Tana; Heard, Marie

emails.subject: RE: ? re: Bankers Trust/ Deutsche Bank
emails.body: Hey Tana. I got a call this morning from someone in the DB offices in London who seems to think that the issues between us, relating to EOL I guess, are all settled and she'd like to know where we'll be signing their assignment agreement. Can you give her a call: 011 44 207 547 0883 I think her name is Sara but I listened to her messege 4 times, and can't really make out what she said her name was. Thanks, Diane

emails.subject: RE: ? re: Bankers Trust/ Deutsche Bank
emails.body: They are settled, but not executed. We have sent the ETA amendment out to the DB lawyer for signature, but we have not gotten it back signed. I'll give here a call.
